subcodes.first_line: Praise be to Him Who caused the dove to warble in praise of the Sun of Glory and illumined the highest horizon with the name of [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمدا لمن انطق الورقاء بالثناء علی شمس البهاء و نور الاوج الاسمی باسم من
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @spiritual transformation, @prayer for praise and gratitude
